title: TC-01: Homepage Visual Quality — Mobile
description: Verify homepage renders correctly on mobile devices with no visual defects

steps.instruction: Open https://clawqa.ai on mobile device (iPhone Safari or Android Chrome)
Read hero text 'AI Builds. Humans Verify.'
steps.expectedResult: Text is clearly readable, gradient renders correctly

steps.instruction: Scroll through all sections of the homepage
steps.expectedResult: No overlapping text, no horizontal scroll
Cards evenly spaced, text readable on small screen
Button is large enough to tap (min 44x44px), navigates to /login

steps.instruction: Check gradient text contrast in different lighting
steps.expectedResult: Text readable even in bright conditions

title: TC-02: GitHub OAuth Login — Mobile
description: Verify full GitHub OAuth redirect chain works on real mobile devices

steps.expectedResult: Login page loads with 'Continue with GitHub' button and demo password field

steps.instruction: Log in to GitHub if needed, then tap 'Authorize'
Wait for redirect back to ClawQA
steps.expectedResult: Lands on /dashboard with GitHub name and avatar shown

title: TC-03: GitHub OAuth — Cancel/Deny
description: Verify graceful handling when user denies GitHub OAuth authorization

steps.instruction: Click 'Cancel' or deny authorization on GitHub

steps.expectedResult: Back on /login, no crash, optional error message

title: TC-04: Demo Login Flow
description: Verify demo password login works end-to-end

steps.expectedResult: Login page loads with password field

title: TC-05: Wrong Password Handling
description: Verify incorrect password shows proper error without revealing system info

steps.expectedResult: Error message appears: 'Invalid password' or similar
Still on /login, no redirect, no server error details exposed

title: TC-06: Mobile Hamburger Menu
description: Verify mobile navigation sidebar opens, navigates, and closes correctly

steps.instruction: Login on mobile device using demo password (ClawQA26)
Verify all menu items: Dashboard, Test Cycles, Bug Reports, Analytics, Settings
Tap ☰ again to open, then tap outside the sidebar
steps.expectedResult: Sidebar opens, then closes on outside tap

title: TC-07: Bug Detail Page — Mobile
description: Verify bug report details are fully readable and correctly formatted on mobile

steps.expectedResult: Bug list loads with multiple entries

steps.instruction: Tap on any bug from the list

steps.expectedResult: Title readable, severity badge colored (red=critical, yellow=major, green=minor)
Steps are numbered and fully readable

steps.instruction: Check device info section at bottom

title: TC-08: Test Cycle Detail — Mobile
description: Verify test cycle details are usable on mobile screens

steps.instruction: Check title, status, and test steps

title: TC-09: Full Flow — iPhone Safari
description: End-to-end verification of entire platform on iPhone Safari

steps.instruction: Open https://clawqa.ai in Safari on iPhone
Tap 'Sign In' → enter ClawQA26 → tap 'Sign In'

title: TC-10: Full Flow — Android Chrome
description: End-to-end verification of entire platform on Android Chrome

steps.instruction: Open https://clawqa.ai in Chrome on Android
Tap 'Sign In' → enter ClawQA26 → tap 'Sign In'
Navigate through Dashboard, Test Cycles, Bug Reports, Analytics, Settings

title: TC-11: Tablet Layout — iPad
description: Verify tablet-specific layout and sidebar behavior

steps.expectedResult: Either permanent sidebar or hamburger — should look intentional, not broken

title: TC-12: Landscape Orientation — Mobile
description: Verify app works in landscape mode on mobile (known issue area)

steps.expectedResult: Login form fully visible without scrolling

title: TC-13: Slow Connection (3G Throttle)
description: Verify app degrades gracefully on slow network connections

steps.instruction: Enable 3G throttling on device or use DevTools Network tab

steps.expectedResult: Page loads with loading indicators, no blank screen
Login completes (may be slow), no timeout errors
Content loads, loading states visible while fetching

title: TC-14: Accessibility — Screen Reader
description: Verify basic screen reader accessibility for key user flows

steps.expectedResult: Homepage elements announced with meaningful labels
Button announced as 'Sign In' or similar
